notes: POST-H-009-A creates the first canonical documentation source registry and schema baseline.

POST-H-009-C adds deterministic Markdown/JSON synchronization checks.
POST-H-009-D registers and validates executable backlogs derived from the roadmap; missing future backlog files are reported as planned info, not blocking drift.
Quality-gate integration remains deferred to POST-H-009-E.
POST-H-010-A promotes POST-H-010 to approved and registers its source-controlled observability retention policy defaults.
Observability runtime artifacts remain non-versionable and excluded from clean archives; inventory/cleanup/export are deferred to later POST-H-010 micro-sprints.

POST-H-010-E closes Observability retention local with an observability-retention quality-gate subgate and dedicated runbook.
